title: Onboarding - Permission for location tracking is accepted and then revoked [Android]
scenario: Find My Device does not prompt for location permission when permission is revoked after onboarding on Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app and complete onboarding, accepting the Location permission when prompted.
2. Navigate to Android Settings > Apps > Poly Lens > Permissions and revoke the Location permission.
3. Return to the Poly Studio Mobile app and go to the Home screen.
4. Tap the menu icon (hamburger menu) or locate the Find My Device feature on the Home screen.
5. Tap on Find My Device to attempt using the feature.
6. Observe the app's response when location permission is missing.
expected: The app should display an appropriate prompt explaining that Location permission is required for Find My Device, and provide a way to re-enable the permission (e.g., a button to go to Android Settings or an in-app grant dialog).
